{"type":"system","subtype":"task_notification","task_id":"a16af57fd7aa9856d","tool_use_id":"toolu_01UhhE6x8LEMNbFw8vzbBcji","status":"completed","output_file":"","summary":"Find telegram/discord route files","usage":{"total_tokens":28808,"tool_uses":15,"duration_ms":20832},"uuid":"f8596ff4-e3c1-4e4a-a6d1-4e8296ac166a","session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01UhhE6x8LEMNbFw8vzbBcji","type":"tool_result","content":[{"type":"text","text":"## Summary\n\nHere are all the Telegram and Discord related API route files in `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/`:\n\n### **Telegram Routes**\n\n1. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/setup/route.ts`**\n   - POST: Sets up the Telegram webhook after deployment. Requires `TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET` for authorization. Validates bot configuration and sets the webhook URL.\n   - GET: Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status (bot configured, webhook URL configured).\n\n2. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts`**\n   - POST: Main Telegram webhook endpoint that handles two types of updates:\n     - `my_chat_member` events: When the bot is added to a group chat, it generates an invite link and saves it to the listing.\n     - `message` events: Handles `/start`, `/link`, and `/link_ID` commands for manual group linking.\n     - Creates notifications for all listing members when a Telegram group is linked.\n     - Sends welcome messages to the Telegram group.\n\n3. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram/route.ts`**\n   - GET: Returns a Telegram deep link for one-click group creation. Only available to the listing author when the group is full and no Telegram link is set. Generates a deepLink that opens Telegram to create a group.\n\n4. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/telegram/route.ts`**\n   - POST: Allows the listing author to manually set a Telegram invite link (validates URL format: `https://t.me/...`, max 512 chars). Only works when the group is full and no link is already set.\n\n### **Discord Routes**\n\n1. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/setup/route.ts`**\n   - POST: Discord bot setup endpoint. Validates `DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET` and checks if the bot is configured. Returns bot info and invite URL for verification.\n\n2. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts`**\n   - POST: Discord webhook endpoint for bot events. Handles `link` type events that link a Discord server to a listing:\n     - Creates a text channel (if not provided) named based on the book title.\n     - Creates an invite link to the channel.\n     - Saves the link and channel ID to the database.\n     - Notifies all listing members via notifications.\n     - Sends a welcome message to the Discord channel.\n     - Verifies webhook secret for authorization.\n\n3. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/auto-discord/route.ts`**\n   - GET: Returns a Discord bot invite URL. Only available to the listing author when the group is full and no Discord link is set. Instructions guide the user to add the bot to their Discord server.\n\n4. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/discord/route.ts`**\n   - POST: Allows the listing author to manually set a Discord invite link (validates URL format: `https://discord.gg/...` or `https://discord.com/invite/...`, max 512 chars). Only works when the group is full and no link is already set.\n\n### **Test Coverage**\n\nThere are **NO dedicated test files** for Telegram or Discord API routes. However, the `listing-detail.test.ts` file includes some test cases that reference telegram/discord fields and contains mocks for `@/lib/telegram` and `@/lib/discord` libraries, but these are primarily used for testing listing detail endpoints, not the Telegram/Discord API routes themselves.\n\nTest file: `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-detail.test.ts`"},{"type":"text","text":"agentId: a16af57fd7aa9856d (use SendMessage with to: 'a16af57fd7aa9856d' to continue this agent)\n<usage>total_tokens: 29673\ntool_uses: 15\nduration_ms: 20835</usage>"}]}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"1fa5580f-c2a1-4ee6-ab42-1d934296eeaf","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:01:20.177Z","tool_use_result":{"status":"completed","prompt":"Find all telegram and discord related API route files in /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/. List every file path and give me a summary of what each route does (read the files). Also check if there are any existing test files for them in /root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/.","agentId":"a16af57fd7aa9856d","content":[{"type":"text","text":"## Summary\n\nHere are all the Telegram and Discord related API route files in `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/`:\n\n### **Telegram Routes**\n\n1. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/setup/route.ts`**\n   - POST: Sets up the Telegram webhook after deployment. Requires `TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET` for authorization. Validates bot configuration and sets the webhook URL.\n   - GET: Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status (bot configured, webhook URL configured).\n\n2. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts`**\n   - POST: Main Telegram webhook endpoint that handles two types of updates:\n     - `my_chat_member` events: When the bot is added to a group chat, it generates an invite link and saves it to the listing.\n     - `message` events: Handles `/start`, `/link`, and `/link_ID` commands for manual group linking.\n     - Creates notifications for all listing members when a Telegram group is linked.\n     - Sends welcome messages to the Telegram group.\n\n3. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram/route.ts`**\n   - GET: Returns a Telegram deep link for one-click group creation. Only available to the listing author when the group is full and no Telegram link is set. Generates a deepLink that opens Telegram to create a group.\n\n4. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/telegram/route.ts`**\n   - POST: Allows the listing author to manually set a Telegram invite link (validates URL format: `https://t.me/...`, max 512 chars). Only works when the group is full and no link is already set.\n\n### **Discord Routes**\n\n1. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/setup/route.ts`**\n   - POST: Discord bot setup endpoint. Validates `DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET` and checks if the bot is configured. Returns bot info and invite URL for verification.\n\n2. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts`**\n   - POST: Discord webhook endpoint for bot events. Handles `link` type events that link a Discord server to a listing:\n     - Creates a text channel (if not provided) named based on the book title.\n     - Creates an invite link to the channel.\n     - Saves the link and channel ID to the database.\n     - Notifies all listing members via notifications.\n     - Sends a welcome message to the Discord channel.\n     - Verifies webhook secret for authorization.\n\n3. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/auto-discord/route.ts`**\n   - GET: Returns a Discord bot invite URL. Only available to the listing author when the group is full and no Discord link is set. Instructions guide the user to add the bot to their Discord server.\n\n4. **`/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/discord/route.ts`**\n   - POST: Allows the listing author to manually set a Discord invite link (validates URL format: `https://discord.gg/...` or `https://discord.com/invite/...`, max 512 chars). Only works when the group is full and no link is already set.\n\n### **Test Coverage**\n\nThere are **NO dedicated test files** for Telegram or Discord API routes. However, the `listing-detail.test.ts` file includes some test cases that reference telegram/discord fields and contains mocks for `@/lib/telegram` and `@/lib/discord` libraries, but these are primarily used for testing listing detail endpoints, not the Telegram/Discord API routes themselves.\n\nTest file: `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-detail.test.ts`"}],"totalDurationMs":20835,"totalTokens":29673,"totalToolUseCount":15,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":300,"cache_read_input_tokens":28442,"output_tokens":929,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":300},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}}}

  2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const listing = db\n    21→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    22→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n    38→      { status: 400 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n    43→\n    44→  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/..., max 512 characters)\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    52→    telegramLink.trim(),\n    53→    listingId\n    54→  );\n    55→\n    56→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    57→}\n    58→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"646d7482-5aa7-438f-a0e4-7b542f39e6db","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:01:24.562Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/telegram/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n\n  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/..., max 512 characters)\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    telegramLink.trim(),\n    listingId\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","numLines":58,"startLine":1,"totalLines":58}}}

  2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const listing = db\n    21→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    22→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n    38→      { status: 400 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n    43→\n    44→  if (\n    45→    !discordLink ||\n    46→    discordLink.length > 512 ||\n    47→    !(\n    48→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n    49→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    50→    )\n    51→  ) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      {\n    54→        error:\n    55→          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/..., max 512 characters)\",\n    56→      },\n    57→      { status: 400 }\n    58→    );\n    59→  }\n    60→\n    61→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    62→    discordLink.trim(),\n    63→    listingId\n    64→  );\n    65→\n    66→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    67→}\n    68→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"1af8a4b9-d900-4ef7-a30f-d0721de18a96","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:01:24.989Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/discord/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n\n  if (\n    !discordLink ||\n    discordLink.length > 512 ||\n    !(\n      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    )\n  ) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error:\n          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/..., max 512 characters)\",\n      },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    discordLink.trim(),\n    listingId\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","numLines":68,"startLine":1,"totalLines":68}}}

11→ * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function GET(\n    14→  _req: NextRequest,\n    15→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    16→) {\n    17→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    18→  if (!session) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    21→      { status: 401 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n    28→      { status: 404 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { id } = await params;\n    33→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    34→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    36→  }\n    37→\n    38→  const listing = db\n    39→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    40→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    41→\n    42→  if (!listing) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"Only the organizer can create the Telegram group\" },\n    49→      { status: 403 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"Group must be full before creating a Telegram group\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    61→    return NextResponse.json(\n    62→      { error: \"Telegram link already set\", telegramLink: listing.telegram_link },\n    63→      { status: 400 }\n    64→    );\n    65→  }\n    66→\n    67→  const deepLink = await generateGroupDeepLink(listingId);\n    68→  if (!deepLink) {\n    69→    return NextResponse.json(\n    70→      { error: \"Failed to generate deep link. Check bot configuration.\" },\n    71→      { status: 500 }\n    72→    );\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  return NextResponse.json({\n    76→    deepLink,\n    77→    instructions:\n    78→      \"Click the link to open Telegram and create a group. The bot will automatically generate an invite link for your reading group.\",\n    79→  });\n    80→}\n    81→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"ba6e1d57-dfbe-469d-a79d-d518b4999fa6","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:01:25.448Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { isBotConfigured, generateGroupDeepLink } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n\n/**\n * GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\n *\n * Returns the Telegram deep link for one-click group creation.\n * Only available to the listing author when the group is full\n * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n */\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the organizer can create the Telegram group\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Group must be full before creating a Telegram group\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Telegram link already set\", telegramLink: listing.telegram_link },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const deepLink = await generateGroupDeepLink(listingId);\n  if (!deepLink) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to generate deep link. Check bot configuration.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    deepLink,\n    instructions:\n      \"Click the link to open Telegram and create a group. The bot will automatically generate an invite link for your reading group.\",\n  });\n}\n","numLines":81,"startLine":1,"totalLines":81}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01SxfmNCEnqiYx3CiPKJAyMg","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateBotInviteUrl } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await getSession();\n    11→  if (!session.userId) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json(\n    13→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    14→      { status: 401 }\n    15→    );\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Discord bot is not configured\" },\n    21→      { status: 503 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  const { id } = await params;\n    26→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    27→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    28→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  const listing = db\n    32→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    33→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    37→  }\n    38→\n    39→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    40→    return NextResponse.json(\n    41→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set up the Discord group\" },\n    42→      { status: 403 }\n    43→    );\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"The group is not full yet\" },\n    49→      { status: 400 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"A Discord link has already been set\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  const inviteUrl = generateBotInviteUrl(listingId);\n    61→\n    62→  return NextResponse.json({\n    63→    inviteUrl,\n    64→    instructions:\n    65→      \"Click the link to add the Bookmate bot to your Discord server. \" +\n    66→      \"The bot will create a reading group channel and generate an invite link for your members.\",\n    67→  });\n    68→}\n    69→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"9287d412-aa01-4e80-a3c5-ca62d6af7ffc","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:01:25.884Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/auto-discord/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { isBotConfigured, generateBotInviteUrl } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await getSession();\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Discord bot is not configured\" },\n      { status: 503 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set up the Discord group\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"The group is not full yet\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"A Discord link has already been set\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const inviteUrl = generateBotInviteUrl(listingId);\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    inviteUrl,\n    instructions:\n      \"Click the link to add the Bookmate bot to your Discord server. \" +\n      \"The bot will create a reading group channel and generate an invite link for your members.\",\n  });\n}\n","numLines":69,"startLine":1,"totalLines":69}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QEBc6DM9CAZkq5Xr2Nx2jD","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     3→\n     4→/**\n     5→ * POST /api/telegram/setup\n     6→ *\n     7→ * Sets up the Telegram webhook. Should be called once after deployment.\n     8→ * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n     9→ *\n    10→ * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n    11→ */\n    12→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    13→  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n    14→  if (!setupSecret) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json(\n    16→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n    17→      { status: 500 }\n    18→    );\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const body = await req.json();\n    22→  if (body.secret !== setupSecret) {\n    23→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json(\n    28→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n    29→      { status: 500 }\n    30→    );\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n    34→  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n    37→      { status: 500 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    42→  if (!bot) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json(\n    44→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    45→      { status: 500 }\n    46→    );\n    47→  }\n    48→\n    49→  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n    50→  if (!success) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n    53→      { status: 500 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({\n    58→    ok: true,\n    59→    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    60→    webhookUrl,\n    61→  });\n    62→}\n    63→\n    64→/**\n    65→ * GET /api/telegram/setup\n    66→ *\n    67→ * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n    68→ */\n    69→export async function GET() {\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({\n    71→    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    72→    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n    73→  });\n    74→}\n    75→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"c993f41d-dec0-46e1-a423-b63d2e8aa7b7","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:01:26.294Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/setup/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n\n/**\n * POST /api/telegram/setup\n *\n * Sets up the Telegram webhook. Should be called once after deployment.\n * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n *\n * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n  if (!setupSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  if (body.secret !== setupSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n  if (!bot) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n  if (!success) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    ok: true,\n    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    webhookUrl,\n  });\n}\n\n/**\n * GET /api/telegram/setup\n *\n * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n */\nexport async function GET() {\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n  });\n}\n","numLines":75,"startLine":1,"totalLines":75}}}

We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    19→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    20→ *\n    21→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    22→ *    command in a handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n    52→  }\n    53→\n    54→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n    55→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    56→}\n    57→\n    58→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\n    59→  chat: {\n    60→    id: number;\n    61→    title?: string;\n    62→    type: string;\n    63→  };\n    64→  from: {\n    65→    id: number;\n    66→    first_name: string;\n    67→  };\n    68→  new_chat_member: {\n    69→    user: {\n    70→      id: number;\n    71→      is_bot: boolean;\n    72→    };\n    73→    status: string;\n    74→  };\n    75→}\n    76→\n    77→interface TelegramMessage {\n    78→  chat: {\n    79→    id: number;\n    80→    type: string;\n    81→    title?: string;\n    82→  };\n    83→  text?: string;\n    84→  from?: {\n    85→    id: number;\n    86→  };\n    87→}\n    88→\n    89→/**\n    90→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n    91→ *\n    92→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n    93→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n    94→ * 1. Creates the group\n    95→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n    96→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n    97→ *\n    98→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n    99→ */\n   100→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n   101→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n   102→\n   103→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n   104→  if (\n   105→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n   106→    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n   107→  ) {\n   108→    return;\n   109→  }\n   110→\n   111→  // Only process group chats\n   112→  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n   113→    return;\n   114→  }\n   115→\n   116→  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n   117→  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n   118→  const pending = db\n   119→    .prepare(\n   120→      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n   121→    )\n   122→    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n   123→\n   124→  if (pending) {\n   125→    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n   126→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n   127→      chat.id\n   128→    );\n   129→    return;\n   130→  }\n   131→\n   132→  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n   133→  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n   134→  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n   135→  await sendMessage(\n   136→    chat.id,\n   137→    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n   138→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n   139→      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n   140→  );\n   141→\n   142→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n   143→  try {\n   144→    db.prepare(\n   145→      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n   146→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n   147→  } catch {\n   148→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n   149→  }\n   150→}\n   151→\n   152→/**\n   153→ * Handle messages in group chats.\n   154→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n   155→ */\n   156→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n   157→  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n   158→    return;\n   159→  }\n   160→\n   161→  const text = message.text.trim();\n   162→\n   163→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n   164→  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n   165→    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n   166→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n   167→    if (listingId) {\n   168→      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   169→      return;\n   170→    }\n   171→  }\n   172→\n   173→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n   174→  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   175→  if (text === \"/link\") {\n   176→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   177→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   178→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   179→      return;\n   180→    }\n   181→\n   182→    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   183→    const linkedUser = db\n   184→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   185→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   186→\n   187→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   188→      await sendMessage(\n   189→        message.chat.id,\n   190→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n   191→          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n   192→      );\n   193→      return;\n   194→    }\n   195→\n   196→    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n   197→    const unlinkedListings = db\n   198→      .prepare(\n   199→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n   200→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n   201→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n   202→         AND author_id = ?\n   203→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n   204→      )\n   205→      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n   206→\n   207→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n   208→      await sendMessage(\n   209→        message.chat.id,\n   210→        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n   211→      );\n   212→      return;\n   213→    }\n   214→\n   215→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n   216→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n   217→      return;\n   218→    }\n   219→\n   220→    const listText = unlinkedListings\n   221→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${l.book_title}\"`)\n   222→      .join(\"\\n\");\n   223→    await sendMessage(\n   224→      message.chat.id,\n   225→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n   226→    );\n   227→    return;\n   228→  }\n   229→\n   230→  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n   231→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n   232→  if (linkMatch) {\n   233→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   234→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   235→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   236→      return;\n   237→    }\n   238→\n   239→    const linkedUser = db\n   240→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   241→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   242→\n   243→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   244→      await sendMessage(\n   245→        message.chat.id,\n   246→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n   247→      );\n   248→      return;\n   249→    }\n   250→\n   251→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n   252→\n   253→    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n   254→    const listing = db\n   255→      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   256→      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n   257→\n   258→    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n   259→      await sendMessage(\n   260→        message.chat.id,\n   261→        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n   262→      );\n   263→      return;\n   264→    }\n   265→\n   266→    if (!listing.is_full) {\n   267→      await sendMessage(\n   268→        message.chat.id,\n   269→        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n   270→      );\n   271→      return;\n   272→    }\n   273→\n   274→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   275→  }\n   276→}\n   277→\n   278→/**\n   279→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n   280→ * 1. Generate an invite link\n   281→ * 2. Save it to the listing\n   282→ * 3. Notify all members\n   283→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n   284→ */\n   285→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n   286→  const listing = db\n   287→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   288→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   289→\n   290→  if (!listing) {\n   291→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n   292→    return;\n   293→  }\n   294→\n   295→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n   296→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n   297→    return;\n   298→  }\n   299→\n   300→  // Try to create an invite link\n   301→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   302→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   303→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n   304→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   305→  }\n   306→\n   307→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   308→    await sendMessage(\n   309→      chatId,\n   310→      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n   311→        \"then try again with /link\"\n   312→    );\n   313→    return;\n   314→  }\n   315→\n   316→  // Save to database\n   317→  db.prepare(\n   318→    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   319→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n   320→\n   321→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n   322→  const members = db\n   323→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   324→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   325→\n   326→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   327→  for (const member of members) {\n   328→    createNotification(\n   329→      member.user_id,\n   330→      listingId,\n   331→      \"telegram_ready\",\n   332→      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n   333→    );\n   334→  }\n   335→\n   336→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n   337→  await sendMessage(\n   338→    chatId,\n   339→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n   340→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n   341→      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n   342→  );\n   343→}\n   344→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"1ccd3ee7-1da4-4bd5-9671-6a88e5d169ec","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:01:26.489Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createChatInviteLink,\n  exportChatInviteLink,\n  sendMessage,\n  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n *\n * Handles two types of updates:\n *\n * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n *    and save it to the listing.\n *\n * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n  try {\n    update = await req.json();\n  } catch {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n  if (update.message) {\n    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n  }\n\n  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\ninterface ChatMemberUpdate {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    title?: string;\n    type: string;\n  };\n  from: {\n    id: number;\n    first_name: string;\n  };\n  new_chat_member: {\n    user: {\n      id: number;\n      is_bot: boolean;\n    };\n    status: string;\n  };\n}\n\ninterface TelegramMessage {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    type: string;\n    title?: string;\n  };\n  text?: string;\n  from?: {\n    id: number;\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n *\n * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n * 1. Creates the group\n * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n *\n * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n */\nasync function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n\n  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n  if (\n    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n  ) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Only process group chats\n  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n  const pending = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (pending) {\n    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n      chat.id\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n  await sendMessage(\n    chat.id,\n    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n  );\n\n  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n  try {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n  } catch {\n    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Handle messages in group chats.\n * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n */\nasync function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const text = message.text.trim();\n\n  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n  if (text === \"/link\") {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n    const unlinkedListings = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n         AND author_id = ?\n         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n      )\n      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listText = unlinkedListings\n      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${l.book_title}\"`)\n      .join(\"\\n\");\n    await sendMessage(\n      message.chat.id,\n      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n  if (linkMatch) {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n\n    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n    const listing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (!listing.is_full) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n * 1. Generate an invite link\n * 2. Save it to the listing\n * 3. Notify all members\n * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n */\nasync function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to create an invite link\n  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  }\n\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    await sendMessage(\n      chatId,\n      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n        \"then try again with /link\"\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Save to database\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"telegram_ready\",\n      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );\n}\n","numLines":344,"startLine":1,"totalLines":344}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015gzruLWfn7ftyDfhnYUFva","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     3→\n     4→/**\n     5→ * Discord bot setup endpoint.\n     6→ * Returns bot info and invite URL for verification.\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Protected by DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET env var.\n     9→ */\n    10→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    11→  const { secret } = await req.json();\n    12→  const setupSecret = process.env.DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET || \"\";\n    13→\n    14→  if (!setupSecret || secret !== setupSecret) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json(\n    16→      { error: \"Invalid setup secret\" },\n    17→      { status: 403 }\n    18→    );\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json(\n    23→      {\n    24→        error:\n    25→          \"Discord bot is not configured. Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID environment variables.\",\n    26→      },\n    27→      { status: 503 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  const botInfo = await getBotInfo();\n    32→  if (!botInfo) {\n    33→    return NextResponse.json(\n    34→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Discord API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    35→      { status: 500 }\n    36→    );\n    37→  }\n    38→\n    39→  return NextResponse.json({\n    40→    ok: true,\n    41→    bot: {\n    42→      id: botInfo.id,\n    43→      username: botInfo.username,\n    44→    },\n    45→    message: `Discord bot \"${botInfo.username}\" is configured and ready.`,\n    46→  });\n    47→}\n    48→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"41bdd8b8-3770-4952-b8d9-9a057dc16da8","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:01:26.744Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/setup/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { isBotConfigured, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\n/**\n * Discord bot setup endpoint.\n * Returns bot info and invite URL for verification.\n *\n * Protected by DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET env var.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const { secret } = await req.json();\n  const setupSecret = process.env.DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET || \"\";\n\n  if (!setupSecret || secret !== setupSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid setup secret\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error:\n          \"Discord bot is not configured. Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID environment variables.\",\n      },\n      { status: 503 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const botInfo = await getBotInfo();\n  if (!botInfo) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to connect to Discord API. Check your bot token.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    ok: true,\n    bot: {\n      id: botInfo.id,\n      username: botInfo.username,\n    },\n    message: `Discord bot \"${botInfo.username}\" is configured and ready.`,\n  });\n}\n","numLines":48,"startLine":1,"totalLines":48}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01P1pwufFFXMSuPp1EmvkaQd","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createTextChannel,\n     5→  createChannelInvite,\n     6→  sendChannelMessage,\n     7→} from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     8→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     9→\n    10→/**\n    11→ * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n    12→ *\n    13→ * This endpoint handles:\n    14→ * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n    15→ *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n    16→ *\n    17→ * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n    18→ * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n    19→ * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n    20→ */\n    21→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    22→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    23→  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    24→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    26→  }\n    27→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    28→  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  try {\n    33→    const body = await req.json();\n    34→    const { type } = body;\n    35→\n    36→    if (type === \"link\") {\n    37→      return handleLink(body);\n    38→    }\n    39→\n    40→    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    41→    if (type === 1) {\n    42→      // PING - respond with PONG\n    43→      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    44→    }\n    45→\n    46→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n    47→  } catch (err) {\n    48→    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    49→    return NextResponse.json(\n    50→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    51→      { status: 500 }\n    52→    );\n    53→  }\n    54→}\n    55→\n    56→async function handleLink(body: {\n    57→  guildId: string;\n    58→  listingId: number;\n    59→  channelId?: string;\n    60→}) {\n    61→  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n    62→\n    63→  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    64→    return NextResponse.json(\n    65→      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n    66→      { status: 400 }\n    67→    );\n    68→  }\n    69→\n    70→  const listing = db\n    71→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    72→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    73→\n    74→  if (!listing) {\n    75→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    76→  }\n    77→\n    78→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    79→    return NextResponse.json(\n    80→      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n    81→      { status: 400 }\n    82→    );\n    83→  }\n    84→\n    85→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    86→    return NextResponse.json(\n    87→      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n    88→      { status: 400 }\n    89→    );\n    90→  }\n    91→\n    92→  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n    93→\n    94→  // If no channel specified, create one\n    95→  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    96→    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    97→    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n    98→      .toLowerCase()\n    99→      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n   100→      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n   101→\n   102→    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n   103→      guildId,\n   104→      channelName,\n   105→      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n   106→    );\n   107→\n   108→    if (!channel) {\n   109→      return NextResponse.json(\n   110→        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n   111→        { status: 500 }\n   112→      );\n   113→    }\n   114→\n   115→    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n   116→  }\n   117→\n   118→  // Create invite link\n   119→  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n   120→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   121→    return NextResponse.json(\n   122→      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n   123→      { status: 500 }\n   124→    );\n   125→  }\n   126→\n   127→  // Save to DB\n   128→  db.prepare(\n   129→    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   130→  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n   131→\n   132→  // Notify all members\n   133→  const members = db\n   134→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   135→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   136→\n   137→  for (const member of members) {\n   138→    createNotification(\n   139→      member.user_id,\n   140→      listingId,\n   141→      \"discord_ready\",\n   142→      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n   143→    );\n   144→  }\n   145→\n   146→  // Send welcome message to the channel\n   147→  await sendChannelMessage(\n   148→    targetChannelId,\n   149→    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n   150→      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n   151→      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n   152→      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n   153→      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n   154→  );\n   155→\n   156→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n   157→}\n   158→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"5c0abc9c-6f78-4b94-b7a4-c0d2da16f9b1","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:01:27.111Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createTextChannel,\n  createChannelInvite,\n  sendChannelMessage,\n} from \"@/lib/discord\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n *\n * This endpoint handles:\n * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n *\n * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { type } = body;\n\n    if (type === \"link\") {\n      return handleLink(body);\n    }\n\n    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    if (type === 1) {\n      // PING - respond with PONG\n      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nasync function handleLink(body: {\n  guildId: string;\n  listingId: number;\n  channelId?: string;\n}) {\n  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n\n  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n\n  // If no channel specified, create one\n  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n      .toLowerCase()\n      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n\n    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n      guildId,\n      channelName,\n      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n    );\n\n    if (!channel) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n        { status: 500 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n  }\n\n  // Create invite link\n  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Save to DB\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"discord_ready\",\n      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send welcome message to the channel\n  await sendChannelMessage(\n    targetChannelId,\n    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n}\n","numLines":158,"startLine":1,"totalLines":158}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01YD9VUFi2RnjMQVE5MACo4x","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\n     2→import { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n     3→\n     4→const testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n     5→  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n     6→  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n     7→  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n     8→  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n     9→  db.exec(`\n    10→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n    11→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    12→      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n    13→      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n    14→      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n    15→      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    16→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    17→    );\n    18→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n    19→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    20→      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    21→      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n    22→      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n    23→      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    24→      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    25→      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n    26→      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n    27→      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n    28→      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n    29→      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n    30→      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    31→      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    32→      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    33→      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n    34→      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    35→      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    36→      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n    37→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    38→      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    39→    );\n    40→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n    41→      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    42→      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    43→      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    44→      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n    45→      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    46→      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    47→    );\n    48→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n    49→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    50→      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    51→      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    52→      status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'\n    53→        CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n    54→      message TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    55→      applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    56→      decided_at TEXT,\n    57→      UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id),\n    58→      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    59→      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    60→    );\n    61→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n    62→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    63→      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    64→      listing_id INTEGER,\n    65→      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    66→      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n    67→      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    68→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    69→      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    70→    );\n    71→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n    72→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    73→      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    74→      rater_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    75→      rated_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    76→      score INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(score >= 1 AND score <= 5),\n    77→      comment TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    78→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    79→      UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id),\n    80→      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"44b5cfff-37f1-4299-91ce-de0f011a3327","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:01:32.634Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-detail.test.ts","content":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'\n        CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n      message TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      decided_at TEXT,\n      UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      rater_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      rated_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      score INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(score >= 1 AND score <= 5),\n      comment TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),","numLines":80,"startLine":1,"totalLines":506}}}

db;\n});\n\nconst mockSession = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  userId: undefined as number | undefined,\n  email: undefined as string | undefined,\n  displayName: undefined as string | undefined,\n  save: vi.fn(),\n  destroy: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  getSession: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(mockSession),\n  requireAuth: vi.fn().mockImplementation(async () => {\n    if (!mockSession.userId) return null;\n    return mockSession;\n  }),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/telegram\", () => ({\n  isBotConfigured: vi.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/discord\", () => ({\n  isBotConfigured: vi.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n}));\n\nconst { GET, PATCH, DELETE: DELETE_HANDLER } = await import(\"@/app/api/listings/[id]/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\").run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    book_title: string;\n    book_author: string;\n    meeting_format: string;\n    max_group_size: number;\n    is_full: number;\n    requires_approval: number;\n    telegram_link: string;\n    discord_link: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb.prepare(\n    `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, requires_approval, telegram_link, discord_link)\n     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n  ).run(\n    authorId,\n    overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\",\n    overrides.book_author ?? \"Test Author\",\n    \"1ch/wk\",\n    \"2026-04-01\",\n    overrides.meeting_format ?? \"text\",\n    overrides.max_group_size ?? 5,\n    overrides.is_full ?? 0,\n    overrides.requires_approval ?? 0,\n    overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\",\n    overrides.discord_link ?? \"\"\n  );\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}","numLines":80,"startLine":80,"totalLines":506}}}

data: T }> {\n    37→  const data = (await response.json()) as T;\n    38→  return { status: response.status, data };\n    39→}\n    40→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"7a896273-e5b0-4807-b197-83559df7937b","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:01:36.998Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/helpers/mock-request.ts","content":"import { NextRequest } from \"next/server\";\n\n/**\n * Create a NextRequest for testing API routes.\n */\nexport function createTestRequest(\n  url: string,\n  options: {\n    method?: string;\n    body?: Record<string, unknown>;\n    headers?: Record<string, string>;\n  } = {}\n) {\n  const { method = \"GET\", body, headers = {} } = options;\n\n  const init: RequestInit = {\n    method,\n    headers: {\n      \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n      ...headers,\n    },\n  };\n\n  if (body) {\n    init.body = JSON.stringify(body);\n  }\n\n  return new NextRequest(new URL(url, \"http://localhost:3000\"), init as NextRequest);\n}\n\n/**\n * Parse the JSON body from a NextResponse.\n */\nexport async function parseResponse<T = Record<string, unknown>>(\n  response: Response\n): Promise<{ status: number; data: T }> {\n  const data = (await response.json()) as T;\n  return { status: response.status, data };\n}\n","numLines":40,"startLine":1,"totalLines":40}}}
