{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CVSyez4RR1EM2sqP135ivi","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Telegram Bot API integration for automatic group creation.\n     3→ *\n     4→ * When TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is set, the system can:\n     5→ * 1. Generate deep links for one-click group creation\n     6→ * 2. Detect when the bot is added to a group (via webhook)\n     7→ * 3. Auto-generate and save invite links\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Flow:\n    10→ * - Author clicks \"Create Telegram Group\" → opens deep link in Telegram\n    11→ * - Telegram prompts author to create a group with the bot\n    12→ * - Bot receives `my_chat_member` update via webhook\n    13→ * - Bot creates an invite link and saves it to the listing\n    14→ */\n    15→\n    16→const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n    17→const TELEGRAM_API = `https://api.telegram.org/bot${BOT_TOKEN}`;\n    18→\n    19→export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n    20→  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0;\n    21→}\n    22→\n    23→/**\n    24→ * Call the Telegram Bot API.\n    25→ */\n    26→async function callApi<T = unknown>(\n    27→  method: string,\n    28→  params?: Record<string, unknown>\n    29→): Promise<{ ok: boolean; result?: T; description?: string }> {\n    30→  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/${method}`, {\n    31→    method: \"POST\",\n    32→    headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    33→    body: JSON.stringify(params || {}),\n    34→  });\n    35→  return res.json();\n    36→}\n    37→\n    38→/**\n    39→ * Get bot info (username, id).\n    40→ */\n    41→export async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n    42→  id: number;\n    43→  username: string;\n    44→  first_name: string;\n    45→} | null> {\n    46→  const res = await callApi<{\n    47→    id: number;\n    48→    username: string;\n    49→    first_name: string;\n    50→  }>(\"getMe\");\n    51→  return res.ok ? res.result! : null;\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→/**\n    55→ * Generate a deep link that opens Telegram and prompts the user\n    56→ * to create a new group with the bot already added.\n    57→ *\n    58→ * Format: https://t.me/BOT_USERNAME?startgroup=listing_LISTING_ID\n    59→ *\n    60→ * When the user creates the group, Telegram adds the bot and\n    61→ * sends a `my_chat_member` update to our webhook.\n    62→ */\n    63→export async function generateGroupDeepLink(\n    64→  listingId: number\n    65→): Promise<string | null> {\n    66→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    67→  if (!bot) return null;\n    68→  return `https://t.me/${bot.username}?startgroup=listing_${listingId}`;\n    69→}\n    70→\n    71→/**\n    72→ * Create an invite link for a chat where the bot is an admin.\n    73→ */\n    74→export async function createChatInviteLink(\n    75→  chatId: number | string\n    76→): Promise<string | null> {\n    77→  const res = await callApi<{ invite_link: string }>(\n    78→    \"createChatInviteLink\",\n    79→    {\n    80→      chat_id: chatId,\n    81→      name: \"Bookmate Reading Group\",\n    82→      creates_join_request: false,\n    83→    }\n    84→  );\n    85→  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n    86→    return res.result.invite_link;\n    87→  }\n    88→  return null;\n    89→}\n    90→\n    91→/**\n    92→ * Export the existing invite link for a chat (fallback).\n    93→ */\n    94→export async function exportChatInviteLink(\n    95→  chatId: number | string\n    96→): Promise<string | null> {\n    97→  const res = await callApi<string>(\"exportChatInviteLink\", {\n    98→    chat_id: chatId,\n    99→  });\n   100→  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n   101→    return res.result;\n   102→  }\n   103→  return null;\n   104→}\n   105→\n   106→/**\n   107→ * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n   108→ */\n   109→export async function sendMessage(\n   110→  chatId: number | string,\n   111→  text: string\n   112→): Promise<boolean> {\n   113→  const res = await callApi(\"sendMessage\", {\n   114→    chat_id: chatId,\n   115→    text,\n   116→    parse_mode: \"HTML\",\n   117→  });\n   118→  return res.ok;\n   119→}\n   120→\n   121→/**\n   122→ * Set up webhook URL for receiving Telegram updates.\n   123→ */\n   124→export async function setWebhook(url: string): Promise<boolean> {\n   125→  const res = await callApi(\"setWebhook\", {\n   126→    url,\n   127→    allowed_updates: [\"my_chat_member\", \"message\"],\n   128→  });\n   129→  return res.ok;\n   130→}\n   131→\n   132→/**\n   133→ * Parse the listing ID from a /start command payload.\n   134→ * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n   135→ */\n   136→export function parseListingIdFromPayload(\n   137→  payload: string\n   138→): number | null {\n   139→  const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n   140→  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n   141→}\n   142→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"4a63983b-bfb5-44d5-9789-10a8c340b844","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:01:41.579Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/telegram.ts","content":"/**\n * Telegram Bot API integration for automatic group creation.\n *\n * When TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is set, the system can:\n * 1. Generate deep links for one-click group creation\n * 2. Detect when the bot is added to a group (via webhook)\n * 3. Auto-generate and save invite links\n *\n * Flow:\n * - Author clicks \"Create Telegram Group\" → opens deep link in Telegram\n * - Telegram prompts author to create a group with the bot\n * - Bot receives `my_chat_member` update via webhook\n * - Bot creates an invite link and saves it to the listing\n */\n\nconst BOT_TOKEN = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\nconst TELEGRAM_API = `https://api.telegram.org/bot${BOT_TOKEN}`;\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0;\n}\n\n/**\n * Call the Telegram Bot API.\n */\nasync function callApi<T = unknown>(\n  method: string,\n  params?: Record<string, unknown>\n): Promise<{ ok: boolean; result?: T; description?: string }> {\n  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/${method}`, {\n    method: \"POST\",\n    headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    body: JSON.stringify(params || {}),\n  });\n  return res.json();\n}\n\n/**\n * Get bot info (username, id).\n */\nexport async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n  id: number;\n  username: string;\n  first_name: string;\n} | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{\n    id: number;\n    username: string;\n    first_name: string;\n  }>(\"getMe\");\n  return res.ok ? res.result! : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate a deep link that opens Telegram and prompts the user\n * to create a new group with the bot already added.\n *\n * Format: https://t.me/BOT_USERNAME?startgroup=listing_LISTING_ID\n *\n * When the user creates the group, Telegram adds the bot and\n * sends a `my_chat_member` update to our webhook.\n */\nexport async function generateGroupDeepLink(\n  listingId: number\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n  if (!bot) return null;\n  return `https://t.me/${bot.username}?startgroup=listing_${listingId}`;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create an invite link for a chat where the bot is an admin.\n */\nexport async function createChatInviteLink(\n  chatId: number | string\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ invite_link: string }>(\n    \"createChatInviteLink\",\n    {\n      chat_id: chatId,\n      name: \"Bookmate Reading Group\",\n      creates_join_request: false,\n    }\n  );\n  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n    return res.result.invite_link;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Export the existing invite link for a chat (fallback).\n */\nexport async function exportChatInviteLink(\n  chatId: number | string\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<string>(\"exportChatInviteLink\", {\n    chat_id: chatId,\n  });\n  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n    return res.result;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n */\nexport async function sendMessage(\n  chatId: number | string,\n  text: string\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\"sendMessage\", {\n    chat_id: chatId,\n    text,\n    parse_mode: \"HTML\",\n  });\n  return res.ok;\n}\n\n/**\n * Set up webhook URL for receiving Telegram updates.\n */\nexport async function setWebhook(url: string): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\"setWebhook\", {\n    url,\n    allowed_updates: [\"my_chat_member\", \"message\"],\n  });\n  return res.ok;\n}\n\n/**\n * Parse the listing ID from a /start command payload.\n * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n */\nexport function parseListingIdFromPayload(\n  payload: string\n): number | null {\n  const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n}\n","numLines":142,"startLine":1,"totalLines":142}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01X91wbGWMbVdX4tKNEEdjgY","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Discord Bot API integration for automatic server/channel creation.\n     3→ *\n     4→ * When DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID are set, the system can:\n     5→ * 1. Generate bot invite URLs so authors can add the bot to their server\n     6→ * 2. Create text channels and invite links via Discord REST API\n     7→ * 3. Receive interaction events via webhook\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Flow:\n    10→ * - Author clicks \"Set up Discord\" → opens bot invite URL\n    11→ * - Author adds bot to their server\n    12→ * - Bot receives an interaction or the author triggers channel creation\n    13→ * - Bot creates a text channel + invite link, saves to listing\n    14→ */\n    15→\n    16→const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n    17→const CLIENT_ID = process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\n    18→const DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n    19→\n    20→export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n    21→  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→/**\n    25→ * Call the Discord REST API.\n    26→ */\n    27→async function callApi<T = unknown>(\n    28→  endpoint: string,\n    29→  method: string = \"GET\",\n    30→  body?: Record<string, unknown>\n    31→): Promise<{ ok: boolean; data?: T; error?: string }> {\n    32→  try {\n    33→    const res = await fetch(`${DISCORD_API}${endpoint}`, {\n    34→      method,\n    35→      headers: {\n    36→        Authorization: `Bot ${BOT_TOKEN}`,\n    37→        \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n    38→      },\n    39→      body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n    40→    });\n    41→\n    42→    if (!res.ok) {\n    43→      const errData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    44→      return {\n    45→        ok: false,\n    46→        error: (errData as Record<string, string>).message || `HTTP ${res.status}`,\n    47→      };\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    const data = (await res.json()) as T;\n    51→    return { ok: true, data };\n    52→  } catch (err) {\n    53→    return { ok: false, error: String(err) };\n    54→  }\n    55→}\n    56→\n    57→/**\n    58→ * Get bot user info.\n    59→ */\n    60→export async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n    61→  id: string;\n    62→  username: string;\n    63→} | null> {\n    64→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; username: string }>(\"/users/@me\");\n    65→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n    66→}\n    67→\n    68→/**\n    69→ * Generate a bot invite URL that includes the listing ID in the state parameter.\n    70→ * The bot needs permissions: Manage Channels, Create Instant Invite, Send Messages\n    71→ *\n    72→ * Permission bits:\n    73→ * - MANAGE_CHANNELS (0x10) = 16\n    74→ * - CREATE_INSTANT_INVITE (0x1) = 1\n    75→ * - SEND_MESSAGES (0x800) = 2048\n    76→ * - VIEW_CHANNEL (0x400) = 1024\n    77→ * Total: 3089\n    78→ */\n    79→export function generateBotInviteUrl(listingId: number): string {\n    80→  const permissions = 3089;\n    81→  const state = `listing_${listingId}`;\n    82→  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${CLIENT_ID}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;\n    83→}\n    84→\n    85→/**\n    86→ * Create a text channel in a guild.\n    87→ */\n    88→export async function createTextChannel(\n    89→  guildId: string,\n    90→  name: string,\n    91→  topic?: string\n    92→): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n    93→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n    94→    `/guilds/${guildId}/channels`,\n    95→    \"POST\",\n    96→    {\n    97→      name: name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, \"-\").slice(0, 100),\n    98→      type: 0, // GUILD_TEXT\n    99→      topic: topic || \"Bookmate reading group discussion channel\",\n   100→    }\n   101→  );\n   102→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n   103→}\n   104→\n   105→/**\n   106→ * Create an invite for a channel.\n   107→ */\n   108→export async function createChannelInvite(\n   109→  channelId: string,\n   110→  maxAge: number = 0 // 0 = never expires\n   111→): Promise<string | null> {\n   112→  const res = await callApi<{ code: string }>(\n   113→    `/channels/${channelId}/invites`,\n   114→    \"POST\",\n   115→    {\n   116→      max_age: maxAge,\n   117→      max_uses: 0,\n   118→      unique: true,\n   119→    }\n   120→  );\n   121→  if (res.ok && res.data) {\n   122→    return `https://discord.gg/${res.data.code}`;\n   123→  }\n   124→  return null;\n   125→}\n   126→\n   127→/**\n   128→ * Send a message to a Discord channel.\n   129→ */\n   130→export async function sendChannelMessage(\n   131→  channelId: string,\n   132→  content: string\n   133→): Promise<boolean> {\n   134→  const res = await callApi(\n   135→    `/channels/${channelId}/messages`,\n   136→    \"POST\",\n   137→    { content }\n   138→  );\n   139→  return res.ok;\n   140→}\n   141→\n   142→/**\n   143→ * Get guild (server) info.\n   144→ */\n   145→export async function getGuild(\n   146→  guildId: string\n   147→): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n   148→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n   149→    `/guilds/${guildId}`\n   150→  );\n   151→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n   152→}\n   153→\n   154→/**\n   155→ * List guilds the bot is a member of.\n   156→ */\n   157→export async function getBotGuilds(): Promise<\n   158→  { id: string; name: string }[]\n   159→> {\n   160→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }[]>(\n   161→    \"/users/@me/guilds\"\n   162→  );\n   163→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : [];\n   164→}\n   165→\n   166→/**\n   167→ * Parse listing ID from a state or payload string.\n   168→ * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n   169→ */\n   170→export function parseListingIdFromState(state: string): number | null {\n   171→  const match = state.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n   172→  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n   173→}\n   174→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"9b78108d-e86b-4121-a113-8b81f252994b","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:01:41.743Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts","content":"/**\n * Discord Bot API integration for automatic server/channel creation.\n *\n * When DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID are set, the system can:\n * 1. Generate bot invite URLs so authors can add the bot to their server\n * 2. Create text channels and invite links via Discord REST API\n * 3. Receive interaction events via webhook\n *\n * Flow:\n * - Author clicks \"Set up Discord\" → opens bot invite URL\n * - Author adds bot to their server\n * - Bot receives an interaction or the author triggers channel creation\n * - Bot creates a text channel + invite link, saves to listing\n */\n\nconst BOT_TOKEN = process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\nconst CLIENT_ID = process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\nconst DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;\n}\n\n/**\n * Call the Discord REST API.\n */\nasync function callApi<T = unknown>(\n  endpoint: string,\n  method: string = \"GET\",\n  body?: Record<string, unknown>\n): Promise<{ ok: boolean; data?: T; error?: string }> {\n  try {\n    const res = await fetch(`${DISCORD_API}${endpoint}`, {\n      method,\n      headers: {\n        Authorization: `Bot ${BOT_TOKEN}`,\n        \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n      },\n      body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n    });\n\n    if (!res.ok) {\n      const errData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n      return {\n        ok: false,\n        error: (errData as Record<string, string>).message || `HTTP ${res.status}`,\n      };\n    }\n\n    const data = (await res.json()) as T;\n    return { ok: true, data };\n  } catch (err) {\n    return { ok: false, error: String(err) };\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Get bot user info.\n */\nexport async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n  id: string;\n  username: string;\n} | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; username: string }>(\"/users/@me\");\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate a bot invite URL that includes the listing ID in the state parameter.\n * The bot needs permissions: Manage Channels, Create Instant Invite, Send Messages\n *\n * Permission bits:\n * - MANAGE_CHANNELS (0x10) = 16\n * - CREATE_INSTANT_INVITE (0x1) = 1\n * - SEND_MESSAGES (0x800) = 2048\n * - VIEW_CHANNEL (0x400) = 1024\n * Total: 3089\n */\nexport function generateBotInviteUrl(listingId: number): string {\n  const permissions = 3089;\n  const state = `listing_${listingId}`;\n  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${CLIENT_ID}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create a text channel in a guild.\n */\nexport async function createTextChannel(\n  guildId: string,\n  name: string,\n  topic?: string\n): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n    `/guilds/${guildId}/channels`,\n    \"POST\",\n    {\n      name: name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, \"-\").slice(0, 100),\n      type: 0, // GUILD_TEXT\n      topic: topic || \"Bookmate reading group discussion channel\",\n    }\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create an invite for a channel.\n */\nexport async function createChannelInvite(\n  channelId: string,\n  maxAge: number = 0 // 0 = never expires\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ code: string }>(\n    `/channels/${channelId}/invites`,\n    \"POST\",\n    {\n      max_age: maxAge,\n      max_uses: 0,\n      unique: true,\n    }\n  );\n  if (res.ok && res.data) {\n    return `https://discord.gg/${res.data.code}`;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Send a message to a Discord channel.\n */\nexport async function sendChannelMessage(\n  channelId: string,\n  content: string\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\n    `/channels/${channelId}/messages`,\n    \"POST\",\n    { content }\n  );\n  return res.ok;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get guild (server) info.\n */\nexport async function getGuild(\n  guildId: string\n): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n    `/guilds/${guildId}`\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * List guilds the bot is a member of.\n */\nexport async function getBotGuilds(): Promise<\n  { id: string; name: string }[]\n> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }[]>(\n    \"/users/@me/guilds\"\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : [];\n}\n\n/**\n * Parse listing ID from a state or payload string.\n * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n */\nexport function parseListingIdFromState(state: string): number | null {\n  const match = state.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n}\n","numLines":174,"startLine":1,"totalLines":174}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01KA6uUUxHsT3rFnuATX9n3a","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01T6CEUJK1wBgiU3zaHFENNi","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh issue create --title \"Test coverage for Telegram and Discord API routes\" --label \"approved\" --body \"Add unit tests for all Telegram and Discord API routes that currently have zero test coverage:\n\n- \\`/api/listings/[id]/telegram\\` — manual Telegram link setting\n- \\`/api/listings/[id]/discord\\` — manual Discord link setting\n- \\`/api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\\` — auto Telegram deep link\n- \\`/api/listings/[id]/auto-discord\\` — auto Discord bot invite\n- \\`/api/telegram/setup\\` — Telegram bot webhook setup\n- \\`/api/telegram/webhook\\` — Telegram webhook event handler\n- \\`/api/discord/setup\\` — Discord bot setup\n- \\`/api/discord/webhook\\` — Discord webhook event handler\n\nThese are the last untested route files in the codebase.\" 2>&1","description":"Create issue for telegram/discord test coverage"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3866,"cache_read_input_tokens":52412,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":3866},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"cb4fda49-7dd8-459d-907a-519126faeee2"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01HTekpM83hPqpvV9Boi8HAe","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_018wikR7aMe9Vqxynxs3K4Ee","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-telegram.test.ts","content":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockSession = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  userId: undefined as number | undefined,\n  email: undefined as string | undefined,\n  displayName: undefined as string | undefined,\n  save: vi.fn(),\n  destroy: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  getSession: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(mockSession),\n  requireAuth: vi.fn().mockImplementation(async () => {\n    if (!mockSession.userId) return null;\n    return mockSession;\n  }),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/listings/[id]/telegram/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    telegram_link: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, telegram_link)\n       VALUES (?, 'Test Book', 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/listings/[id]/telegram\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/1/telegram\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"https://t.me/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"1\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/abc/telegram\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"https://t.me/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"abc\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 when listing not found\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/999/telegram\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"https://t.me/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"999\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when user is not the author\", async () => {\n    const authorId = insertUser(\"author@test.com\", \"Author\");\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = otherId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/telegram`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"https://t.me/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when group is not full\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 0 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/telegram`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"https://t.me/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid telegram link\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n\n    // Missing link\n    let req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/telegram`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"\" },\n    });\n    let res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    expect(res.status).toBe(400);\n\n    // Wrong prefix\n    req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/telegram`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"https://example.com/group\" },\n    });\n    res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    expect(res.status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"sets telegram link successfully\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/telegram`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"https://t.me/+abcdef123\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ ok: true });\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+abcdef123\");\n  });\n});\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":367,"cache_read_input_tokens":56662,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":367},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"96f6dd93-28ad-4cec-ba79-834258f3e59b"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":2,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"cts/bookmate"}},"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"7c64e764-e378-4bc1-8069-ca0fc4d357e6"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_018wikR7aMe9Vqxynxs3K4Ee","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-telegram.test.ts"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"91eb0ef4-fa83-4f9d-ac5d-d248c6d684da","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:02:29.548Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-telegram.test.ts","content":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockSession = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  userId: undefined as number | undefined,\n  email: undefined as string | undefined,\n  displayName: undefined as string | undefined,\n  save: vi.fn(),\n  destroy: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  getSession: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(mockSession),\n  requireAuth: vi.fn().mockImplementation(async () => {\n    if (!mockSession.userId) return null;\n    return mockSession;\n  }),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/listings/[id]/telegram/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    telegram_link: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, telegram_link)\n       VALUES (?, 'Test Book', 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/listings/[id]/telegram\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/1/telegram\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"https://t.me/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"1\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/abc/telegram\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"https://t.me/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"abc\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 when listing not found\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/999/telegram\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"https://t.me/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"999\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when user is not the author\", async () => {\n    const authorId = insertUser(\"author@test.com\", \"Author\");\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = otherId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/telegram`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"https://t.me/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when group is not full\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 0 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/telegram`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"https://t.me/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid telegram link\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n\n    // Missing link\n    let req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/telegram`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"\" },\n    });\n    let res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    expect(res.status).toBe(400);\n\n    // Wrong prefix\n    req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/telegram`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"https://example.com/group\" },\n    });\n    res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    expect(res.status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"sets telegram link successfully\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/telegram`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { telegramLink: \"https://t.me/+abcdef123\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ ok: true });\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+abcdef123\");\n  });\n});\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01HTekpM83hPqpvV9Boi8HAe","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_016vzPZ1uxb33XgKADT2XHGo","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-discord.test.ts","content":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockSession = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  userId: undefined as number | undefined,\n  email: undefined as string | undefined,\n  displayName: undefined as string | undefined,\n  save: vi.fn(),\n  destroy: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  getSession: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(mockSession),\n  requireAuth: vi.fn().mockImplementation(async () => {\n    if (!mockSession.userId) return null;\n    return mockSession;\n  }),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/listings/[id]/discord/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    discord_link: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, discord_link)\n       VALUES (?, 'Test Book', 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.discord_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/listings/[id]/discord\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/1/discord\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://discord.gg/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"1\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/abc/discord\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://discord.gg/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"abc\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 when listing not found\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/999/discord\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://discord.gg/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"999\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when user is not the author\", async () => {\n    const authorId = insertUser(\"author@test.com\", \"Author\");\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = otherId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/discord`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://discord.gg/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when group is not full\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 0 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/discord`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://discord.gg/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid discord link\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n\n    // Wrong prefix\n    let req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/discord`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://example.com/invite\" },\n    });\n    let res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    expect(res.status).toBe(400);\n\n    // Empty\n    req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/discord`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"\" },\n    });\n    res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    expect(res.status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"accepts discord.gg link\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/discord`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://discord.gg/abc123\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ ok: true });\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT discord_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { discord_link: string };\n    expect(listing.discord_link).toBe(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"accepts discord.com/invite link\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/discord`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://discord.com/invite/abc123\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ ok: true });\n  });\n});\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":367,"cache_read_input_tokens":56662,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":367},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"cf3664fd-f75b-4c33-adc7-6ab198639c46"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_016vzPZ1uxb33XgKADT2XHGo","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-discord.test.ts"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"25771015-4ea2-4dfd-b2b7-f02d3b0208f4","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:02:47.356Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-discord.test.ts","content":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockSession = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  userId: undefined as number | undefined,\n  email: undefined as string | undefined,\n  displayName: undefined as string | undefined,\n  save: vi.fn(),\n  destroy: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  getSession: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(mockSession),\n  requireAuth: vi.fn().mockImplementation(async () => {\n    if (!mockSession.userId) return null;\n    return mockSession;\n  }),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/listings/[id]/discord/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    discord_link: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, discord_link)\n       VALUES (?, 'Test Book', 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.discord_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/listings/[id]/discord\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/1/discord\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://discord.gg/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"1\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/abc/discord\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://discord.gg/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"abc\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 when listing not found\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/999/discord\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://discord.gg/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"999\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when user is not the author\", async () => {\n    const authorId = insertUser(\"author@test.com\", \"Author\");\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = otherId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/discord`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://discord.gg/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when group is not full\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 0 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/discord`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://discord.gg/test\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid discord link\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n\n    // Wrong prefix\n    let req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/discord`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://example.com/invite\" },\n    });\n    let res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    expect(res.status).toBe(400);\n\n    // Empty\n    req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/discord`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"\" },\n    });\n    res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    expect(res.status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"accepts discord.gg link\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/discord`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://discord.gg/abc123\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ ok: true });\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT discord_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { discord_link: string };\n    expect(listing.discord_link).toBe(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"accepts discord.com/invite link\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/discord`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { discordLink: \"https://discord.com/invite/abc123\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ ok: true });\n  });\n});\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":3,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"\"}"}},"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"dc37179e-a1dc-4c6c-b86a-db93d757da6e"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01HTekpM83hPqpvV9Boi8HAe","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01BFmsWWXqntTaux3eiZtibE","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-auto-telegram.test.ts","content":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockSession = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  userId: undefined as number | undefined,\n  email: undefined as string | undefined,\n  displayName: undefined as string | undefined,\n  save: vi.fn(),\n  destroy: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst mockTelegram = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  isBotConfigured: vi.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n  generateGroupDeepLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/BookmateBot?startgroup=listing_1\"),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  getSession: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(mockSession),\n  requireAuth: vi.fn().mockImplementation(async () => {\n    if (!mockSession.userId) return null;\n    return mockSession;\n  }),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/telegram\", () => mockTelegram);\n\nconst { GET } = await import(\"@/app/api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    telegram_link: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, telegram_link)\n       VALUES (?, 'Test Book', 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\ndescribe(\"GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n    mockTelegram.isBotConfigured.mockReturnValue(true);\n    mockTelegram.generateGroupDeepLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/BookmateBot?startgroup=listing_1\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/1/auto-telegram\");\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"1\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 when bot is not configured\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    mockTelegram.isBotConfigured.mockReturnValue(false);\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/1/auto-telegram\");\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"1\" }) });\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"botConfigured\", false);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/abc/auto-telegram\");\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"abc\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 when listing not found\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/999/auto-telegram\");\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"999\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when user is not the author\", async () => {\n    const authorId = insertUser(\"author@test.com\", \"Author\");\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = otherId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/auto-telegram`);\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when group is not full\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 0 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/auto-telegram`);\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when telegram link already set\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1, telegram_link: \"https://t.me/existing\" });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/auto-telegram`);\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"telegramLink\", \"https://t.me/existing\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns deep link on success\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    mockTelegram.generateGroupDeepLink.mockResolvedValue(`https://t.me/BookmateBot?startgroup=listing_${listingId}`);\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/auto-telegram`);\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"deepLink\");\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"instructions\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when deep link generation fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    mockTelegram.generateGroupDeepLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/auto-telegram`);\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n});\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":367,"cache_read_input_tokens":56662,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":367},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"d6b4022e-c1aa-4a5a-83c5-68807a083168"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":4,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":", \"c"}},"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"64f9bb27-95c8-4caa-8fe6-c0e4a6e78a61"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01BFmsWWXqntTaux3eiZtibE","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-auto-telegram.test.ts"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5f7c6a3e-6bc6-4c2f-a059-70b44d05703c","uuid":"7ca8e25d-2e59-41de-b1a9-b065f1825f19","timestamp":"2026-03-23T22:03:06.467Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-auto-telegram.test.ts","content":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockSession = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  userId: undefined as number | undefined,\n  email: undefined as string | undefined,\n  displayName: undefined as string | undefined,\n  save: vi.fn(),\n  destroy: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst mockTelegram = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  isBotConfigured: vi.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n  generateGroupDeepLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/BookmateBot?startgroup=listing_1\"),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  getSession: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(mockSession),\n  requireAuth: vi.fn().mockImplementation(async () => {\n    if (!mockSession.userId) return null;\n    return mockSession;\n  }),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/telegram\", () => mockTelegram);\n\nconst { GET } = await import(\"@/app/api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    telegram_link: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, telegram_link)\n       VALUES (?, 'Test Book', 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\ndescribe(\"GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n    mockTelegram.isBotConfigured.mockReturnValue(true);\n    mockTelegram.generateGroupDeepLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/BookmateBot?startgroup=listing_1\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/1/auto-telegram\");\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"1\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 when bot is not configured\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    mockTelegram.isBotConfigured.mockReturnValue(false);\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/1/auto-telegram\");\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"1\" }) });\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"botConfigured\", false);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/abc/auto-telegram\");\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"abc\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 when listing not found\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/listings/999/auto-telegram\");\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: \"999\" }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when user is not the author\", async () => {\n    const authorId = insertUser(\"author@test.com\", \"Author\");\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = otherId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/auto-telegram`);\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when group is not full\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 0 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/auto-telegram`);\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when telegram link already set\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1, telegram_link: \"https://t.me/existing\" });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/auto-telegram`);\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"telegramLink\", \"https://t.me/existing\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns deep link on success\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    mockTelegram.generateGroupDeepLink.mockResolvedValue(`https://t.me/BookmateBot?startgroup=listing_${listingId}`);\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/auto-telegram`);\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"deepLink\");\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"instructions\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when deep link generation fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockSession.userId = userId;\n    mockTelegram.generateGroupDeepLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    const req = createTestRequest(`http://localhost:3000/api/listings/${listingId}/auto-telegram`);\n    const res = await GET(req, { params: Promise.resolve({ id: String(listingId) }) });\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n});\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}
